Uliana Parkina

The world is full not of magic, but of matrices

About Publications Notes

Hi, my name is Uliana Parkina, and I am a researcher at HSE University, Russia, in the MTML Lab (Matrix and Tensor Methods in Machine Learning). My supervisor is Maxim Rakhuba.

My research interests lie at the intersection of numerical linear algebra and machine learning. In particular, I am interested in matrix and tensor methods, optimization, and the numerical aspects of modern machine learning algorithms.

I am currently pursuing a Bachelor’s degree in Applied Mathematics and Information Science at the Faculty of Computer Science, HSE University.

Education

  • 2023–2027 — B.Sc. in Applied Mathematics and Information Science, Faculty of Computer Science, HSE University

  • Future plans:

    • M.Sc. degree — TBD
    • Ph.D. — your university could be here :)

Research Interests

  • Numerical Linear Algebra
  • Machine Learning
  • Matrix and Tensor Methods
  • Optimization
  • Scientific Computing
  • Deep Learning Theory
